ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Rowena Navia appearing for and with conservator Gene Marchi. Mr. Marchi has taken fees. The fees taken were less than have been authorized. Court is reducing the authorization for the future. Court will allow three hours for $375.00. Order signed. Bond is reduced to $10,000.00.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Guitron.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Continued To Aug-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARENCE
CRUYT CONTINUED THE MATTER UNTIL 8/27/07. ATTORNYE AND PETITIONER MUST BE PRESENT.

JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN, REPORTER: KATY BERSAMIN, CSR#11722, CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON; BALIFF:M.LOOS
